text.message: I’d rather 6,11,12 but OJ might cook
no wheat will make me slow
I got no idea if I made the right play or not tbh. Just too scared of you with wood port OJ
I think I’ve made you a lot worse though sorry
I say sorry but that was my intention
the good part of having no cards is i cant get robbed a 3rd time
hold on, i can't get submarined, have no port, no wheat and be the leader...
blue has a killer port and CITY, and green has all the ore
but you stole from me lol...
Yeah saw that mono coming haha
and don't block 8 pls if you want me to trade wheat and the 6 is the better block on blue anyway
i would have traded cards for you to port for a dev on your turn
but you passed 2 quick and then i 7ed out
I think we have tried to exploit each other too much already though
i already traded a trade just to help you that did not help me
i already did a trade that did nothing for me
My bad Oj. Didn’t realise it was you
green would never trade blue, has been holding devs
cmon oj, the 6 is still the better block
6 wheat the block there but all g
and oj gets punished for their own idiocy 2x over
once with a dirty mono and once by blocking terribly
